ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Potatoes (65%), sunflower oil (28%), balsamico vinegar and seasalt seasoning (7%) (salt, sugar, whey powder (milk), natural flavourings (milk), acidity regulator (sodium diacetate), spices, sea salt (0.2%), acids (malic acid, citric acid), dried glucose syrup, balsamic vinegar 0.01%).
